topic: Messi scores as Miami wins rescheduled friendly

stories.title: Messi scores as Miami wins rescheduled friendly
stories.summary: Inter Miami CF beat Independiente del Valle 2-1 on Thursday night in Puerto Rico with goals from Santiago Morales and Lionel Messi to conclude the team's preseason friendly tour.

topic: Ronaldo buys 25% stake in Spanish club Almeria

stories.title: Ronaldo buys 25% stake in Spanish club Almeria
stories.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has acquired a 25% ownership stake in Spanish second division club UD Almeria.
